en.name: Geometry Dash
en.desc: Jump through spikes and blocks! A rhythm-based endless runner with progressive difficulty.
en.description: Geometry Dash is an addictive rhythm-based platformer where you guide a jumping cube through dangerous passages filled with spikes and blocks. The goal is to survive as long as possible! With progressively harder difficulty, each level challenges your timing and jumping skills!
en.objectives: Guide a jumping cube through dangerous passages. Time your jumps perfectly to avoid spikes and obstacles. Survive as long as possible and beat your high score.
en.howToPlay: Click or tap the screen to jump. You can also press Space, W, or Up Arrow. Avoid spikes and blocks. The game gets progressively harder. One hit and it's game over!

rules.controls: Click, tap, Space, W, or Up Arrow to jump. The cube automatically moves forward.
mechanics: Spikes and blocks must be avoided
Hitting any obstacle ends the game

tips: Watch the rhythm and move along with the obstacles
Use the rhythm to get into a flow state

faq.question: What happens when I hit a spike?
faq.answer: Game over! Touching any spike or obstacle instantly ends your run.

faq.question: Can I double jump?
faq.answer: No, you can only jump once while in the air. Time your jumps carefully!

faq.question: How does the speed increase?
faq.answer: Speed increases gradually as you progress, making patterns more challenging. React faster!

zh.name: 几何冲刺
zh.desc: 跳跃穿越尖刺和障碍物！节奏跑酷游戏，考验你的反应速度。
zh.description: 几何冲刺是一款令人上瘾的节奏跑酷游戏，你引导一个跳跃的立方体穿过充满尖刺和障碍物的危险通道。目标是尽可能长时间生存！随着难度逐渐增加，每个关卡都挑战你的时机和跳跃技巧！
zh.objectives: 引导跳跃的立方体穿越危险的通道。完美把握跳跃时机来躲避尖刺和障碍物。尽可能长时间生存并打破你的最高分。
zh.howToPlay: 点击或触摸屏幕跳跃。你也可以按空格键、W键或上箭头。躲避尖刺和障碍物。游戏难度逐渐增加。碰到任何障碍物游戏结束！

rules.controls: 点击、触摸屏幕、空格键、W键或上箭头来跳跃。立方体自动向前移动。
mechanics: 必须躲避尖刺和障碍物
完美跳跃保持立方体速度
碰到任何障碍物游戏结束

tips: 观察节奏并随着障碍物移动
熟能生巧 - 继续尝试！
利用节奏进入心流状态

faq.question: 碰到尖刺会怎样？
faq.answer: 游戏结束！碰到任何尖刺或障碍物会立即结束你的游戏。

faq.question: 可以二段跳吗？
faq.answer: 不可以，你在空中只能跳跃一次。仔细把握跳跃时机！

faq.question: 速度如何增加？
faq.answer: 速度随着你的进展逐渐增加，使模式更具挑战性。反应要更快！
